tools.name: fetch_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Retrieves security vulnerabilities from the GitLab project. Use this to identify what needs fixing.

tools.name: create_secure_fix
tools.description: Creates a new branch and commits a security fix. Use this after the AI has generated a patch.

branch_name.description: Name of the new branch, e.g., 'fix/security-vuln-123'

tools.name: audit_carbon_impact
tools.description: Uses Google Cloud Vertex AI to check if the proposed code or infrastructure change is energy efficient.

config_content.description: The content of the .gitlab-ci.yml or terraform file to audit.
